home.aboutTitle: Sustainably developing Cameroon's cocoa and coffee sub-sectors
home.aboutText: The Cocoa and Coffee Sub-Sectors Development Fund channels resources towards research, support to producers and sub-sector revival — for sustainable, fair growth aligned with international standards.
home.adminQuoteFallback: Our ambition: making FODECC a model institution — transparent and aligned with international standards — serving producers.
